writings.title: Desire and Pain: The Thirteen Watchtowers of Cannaregio
writings.meta: Drawing Matter, Co-authored with Mehrshad Atashi, 2024
writings.excerpt: A close reading of John Hejduk's drawing through literary theory, examining program inversion, ritual, time, and the observer as inhabitant of space.

writings.title: John Hejduk's Farm Library
writings.meta: Drawing Matter, Co-authored with Mehrshad Atashi, 2024
writings.excerpt: Drawing as pedagogy. A single architectural drawing as entry point to understanding time, memory, and the inhabited other.

writings.title: Remoteness from the Proto-Image of Convention: Exploring Daniel Libeskind's Works (1970–1985) alongside His One Hundred Precedents
writings.meta: Doctoral Dissertation, University of Innsbruck, December 2024. Supervisor: Peter Volgger
writings.excerpt: Exploring Daniel Libeskind's works (1970–1985) alongside his One Hundred Precedents. Kant's schema-versus-image distinction as conceptual framework. Chapters on Micromega, the Three Lessons in Architecture, Myth and Idea of Site, and architectural otherness.
